family_catalog.name: bvst.catalog.family.sampler-wave.v1
notes: Future recursive sampler releases should publish under a dedicated family root.
Sample source artifacts, manifests, and rendered source catalogs belong here, not in the frozen 53-artifact bundle.

proposed_batches.purpose: Sampler shells, source-manifest schema, and bootstrap helpers
Recursive sample leaves and sample source manifests
Rendered source catalogs and family/release catalogs after live token capture

stop_conditions: do not freeze sampler-wave until engine-level sample ingest smoke passes in browser automation
do not publish recursive sample source catalogs until byte budgets and per-sample fee economics are quoted from live state
